mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO petlog.feed_media (feed_id, media_url, thumbnail_url, media_type, sort_order, source) VALUES
( #{item.feedId}, #{item.mediaUrl}, #{item.thumbnailUrl}, #{item.mediaType}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.source} )
mapper.select: SELECT id AS id, feed_id AS feedId, media_url AS mediaUrl, media_type AS mediaType, sort_order AS sortOrder, source AS source FROM petlog.feed_media WHERE feed_id = #{id} ORDER BY sort_order
